moments.author: Claude (Anthropic)
moments.quote: Beginning July 20, Claude Fable 5 will be included in all Max and Team Premium plans, at 50% of limits.
moments.why: Massive buzz among AI and tech users frustrated by prior access uncertainty to Anthropic’s flagship model.

moments.author: Anthropic (via multiple news outlets)
moments.quote: Claude Fable 5 added to Max and Team Premium plans at 50% of usage limits
moments.why: Confirms more stable access for paid users after a chaotic rollout, trending in AI circles.

moments.author: US House of Representatives
moments.quote: House votes 308‑117 to make daylight saving time permanent
moments.why: Huge cultural moment—men 25‑45 are talking about more evening daylight and end of clock switching.

moments.author: US House (reported)
moments.quote: Sunshine Protection Act passes House — permanent DST (308‑117)
moments.why: Memes and heated opinions exploded around this—parents vs night‑owl workers especially engaged.

moments.author: MLB—through Aaron Judge coverage
moments.quote: Aaron Judge: “some progress, some healing … not fully healed” on rib fracture
moments.why: Yankees fans and fantasy leagues buzzing—health update impacts trade‑deadline chatter.
